statements.__comment: Flag HA resources that are not in a running state
statements.query: MATCH (hr:ProxmoxHAResource {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE hr.state <> 'started' AND hr.state <> 'running' SET hr.ha_risk = true
statements.name: Mark HA resources not running

statements.__comment: Flag HA groups with restricted mode but no nodes configured
statements.query: MATCH (hg:ProxmoxHAGroup {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE hg.restricted = true AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (hg)<-[:MEMBER_OF_HA_GROUP]-() } SET hg.ha_risk = true
statements.name: Mark restricted HA groups with no resources

statements.__comment: Flag HA resources with max_relocate = 0 (no failover allowed)
statements.query: MATCH (hr:ProxmoxHAResource {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE hr.max_relocate = 0 SET hr.ha_risk = true
statements.name: Mark HA resources with no failover allowed

statements.__comment: Flag HA resources with max_restart = 0 (no restart on failure)
statements.query: MATCH (hr:ProxmoxHAResource {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE hr.max_restart = 0 SET hr.ha_risk = true
statements.name: Mark HA resources with no restart on failure

statements.__comment: Flag VMs with HA configured but not protected by any HA resource
statements.query: MATCH (v:ProxmoxVM {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE v.template = false AND NOT EXISTS { MATCH (hr:ProxmoxHAResource {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:PROTECTS]->(v) } SET v.ha_risk = true
statements.name: Mark VMs without HA protection

statements.__comment: Flag HA groups with nofailback that have resources that could fail back
statements.query: MATCH (hg:ProxmoxHAGroup {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE hg.nofailback = true AND EXISTS { MATCH (hg)<-[:MEMBER_OF_HA_GROUP]-(hr:ProxmoxHAResource {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE hr.state = 'started' } SET hg.ha_risk = true
statements.name: Mark HA groups with nofailback that have running resources
